videoSnippet.title: MOTMA x Challenger || Rapport vs Sindarov || FIDE World Rapid Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Rapport, Richard (2676) - Sindarov, Javokhir (2718)
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.06.17
C69 Ruy Lopez, exchange variation, 5.O-O

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Bxc6 dxc6 5.O-O Bg4 6.h3 Bh5 7.g4 Bg6 8.Nxe5 Bd6 9.Nxg6 hxg6 10.Qf3 Qd7 11.d4 O-O-O 12.Nd2 f5 13.e5 Be7 14.Nb3 Rh4 15.gxf5 gxf5 16.Bf4 g5 17.Bg3 Rxh3 18.e6 Qxe6 19.Rfe1 Qd5 20.Qxd5 cxd5 21.Be5 Rh7 22.Kg2 Nf6 23.Bxf6 Bxf6 24.Re6 Rf8 25.Rae1 b6 26.c3 g4 27.Nc1 f4 28.Re8+ Rxe8 29.Rxe8+ Kd7 30.Rg8 Rg7 31.Rxg7+ Bxg7 32.Nd3 g3 33.Nxf4 gxf2 34.Nxd5 Bh6 35.Kxf2 Bc1 36.b3 Bb2 37.Ke3 Kd6 38.Nf6 Bc1+ 39.Kd3 Bh6 40.Ng4 Bg7 41.Ne3 Bf8 42.c4 Kc6 43.Ng4 Kd6 44.Nf6 Ke6 45.Nd5 Kd7 46.b4 Kc6 47.Ke4 Bg7 48.Ne7+ Kd7 49.Nd5 Kc6 50.a4 Bf8 51.Ke5 Bg7+ 52.Nf6 b5 53.d5+ Kb7 54.axb5 axb5 55.c5 Bh6 56.Ne4 Bc1 57.Kd4 Bb2+ 58.Kd3 Be5 59.Nc3 Ka6 60.Ne2 Bb2 61.Nd4 Ba3 62.Nc6 Kb7 63.Ke4 Kc8 64.Kf5 Bc1 65.Ke6 Kb7 66.Na5+ Ka6 67.Kd7 Bd2 68.d6
